description_long: This is a modern bathroom vanity cabinet featuring a rectangular wooden body with a natural light oak finish. On top of the cabinet sits a round, white ceramic vessel sink paired with a sleek, white single-lever faucet. The front of the cabinet includes a large white sliding or hinged door, with an open shelf section on the left for accessible storage. The rear view reveals visible plumbing and mounting hardware, indicating its intended use as a bathroom fixture. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a combination of wood and white surfaces for a contemporary look. The cabinet is likely wall-mounted and provides both concealed and open storage options.
description: A modern wooden bathroom vanity with a white vessel sink, single-lever faucet, and a combination of open and closed storage. Features a minimalist design with visible plumbing at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round white vessel sink and faucet atop the wooden cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open shelf, large white door, and the full length of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear side view focusing on the wooden texture and the alignment of the sink and faucet.
description_view_3: Back view exposing the plumbing, mounting hardware, and the unfinished rear of the cabinet.
